    In With The New

    We’re always innovating. We’re always looking for the best materials and discovering new ways to make our gear better. Whatever it is you’re looking to add to your closet for your next workout, we’ve got it. From the newest Under Armour women’s shoes, to the latest drops in workout tops and leggings, we’ve got an ever-growing list of women’s new arrivals that are all built to make you better.

     

    Under Armour women’s athletic shoes are the best you’ll ever lace up, built from super-light materials that support your foot, while cushioning your feet to keep you going longer. From running to basketball to training, Under Armour shoes are essential athletic gear to help you keep getting better.

     

    Check out women’s workout clothes and shoes that are just as comfortable outside of the gym as they are inside of it. The Project Rock collection features gear that works as hard as you do for what you want. Shop through the collection’s shoes that include UA HOVR™ cushioning that helps reduce the impact of your step, UA TriBase™ that helps promote a natural motion and grip on lifts, and UA Clone uppers for a customized fit. Plus, the colorways in this collection really pop, so your personality shines just as bright when you’re outside of the gym.

     

    Our women’s new arrivals also showcase our classic HeatGear® fabrics in new colorways and styles. Shop sports bras that feature HeatGear® for a next-to-skin feel that not only wicks away sweat and dries fast, but also delivers the kind of support you need. And when it’s cold out, we’ve got something for that, too. Check out our ColdGear collection that helps you stay warm when the weather gets harsh.

     

    Find comfort and performance in other Under Armour women’s new arrivals like hoodies and sweatshirts, pants, and accessories. We’ve got something for you to wear for pretty much every sport, pregame and post-game, to and from the gym, all built to make you better.

    Stay in the loop.
